source.title: Fixed Point Theorems for Various Contractions in Super Metric Spaces
source.journal: Boletim da Sociedade Paranaense de Matemática
source.volume_issue: Vol 44 No 7 (2026): Nonlinear Analysis and Applied Mathematics
source.abstract_summary: Proves fixed point theorems for various contractions in super metric spaces.

urf_relevance.theme: fixed point contraction principles in generalized metric structures
urf_relevance.frontier_role: possible source for contraction/fixed-point vocabulary only; no import into URF without theorem extraction

required_before_promotion: extract exact definitions of super metric space and contraction classes
identify whether any contraction theorem is nonstandard and reusable
map contraction structure into URF fixed-point or convergence vocabulary
